history.text: House of Grimaldi (under the sovereignty of the Republic of Genoa).
Monaco became independent from the French Empire, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Monaco became independent from occupation of the Sixth Coalition, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Franco-Monégasque Treaty set new terms for sovereignty or administration.
A constitution set out Monaco's basic framework of government.

worthSeeing.text: The legendary Belle Époque casino has defined glamour since 1863.

worthSeeing.title: Prince's Palace:
worthSeeing.text: The Grimaldi dynasty has ruled from this fortress since 1297.
